text: The subject property is a multi-tenant commercial office building located at 2708 McGraw Drive in Bloomington, McLean County, Illinois. The property is situated on an approximately 33,541 square foot (0.77-acre) site and is improved with a single-story commercial building containing approximately 9,724 square feet of gross and rentable building area. The improvements were constructed circa 1980 and are configured to accommodate multiple professional and medical-oriented tenants. The building is currently divided into three individual suites, including a medical office, a small salon, and one vacant office suite. The existing configuration provides flexibility for continued medical, office, or general commercial occupancy, consistent with market demand in the area. The vacant suite is finished for office use and appears readily leasable without the need for significant reconfiguration, subject to tenant-specific requirements.
